name: culinary-jems-marketing
description: Culinary JEMs marketing automation — template rendering and content generation

scripts.test:schedule: node render-template.js schedule-card '{"venue":"SanTan Brewing Co.","date":"Friday, March 7","time":"5:00 - 9:00 PM","address":"8 S San Marcos Pl","city":"Chandler, AZ"}' ./output/test-schedule.png
scripts.test:spotlight: node render-template.js menu-spotlight '{"name":"The Fat Sam","protein":"Beef","description":"Four Peaks Kilt Lifter braised beef, tobacco onions, roasted garlic aioli","photoUrl":"../public/assets/imported/ig-goldwater.jpg"}' ./output/test-spotlight.png
scripts.test:story: node render-template.js story-event '{"headline":"TONIGHT!","venue":"Goldwater Brewing","time":"5:00 - 9:00 PM","address":"3608 E Indian School Rd, Phoenix","bgPhotoUrl":"../public/assets/imported/ig-sliders-brewery.jpg","photo1":"../public/assets/imported/ig-sliders-rack.jpg","photo2":"../public/assets/imported/ig-food-kitsune.jpg","photo3":"../public/assets/imported/ig-goldwater.jpg"}' ./output/test-story.png
scripts.test:all: npm run test:schedule && npm run test:spotlight && npm run test:story && npm run test:recap && npm run test:catering
